I'm now in the planning phase, working to define a comprehensive systems diagnostic. My focus is on employing all available discovery and troubleshooting methods. I will prioritize the assessment of the nix configuration found at ~/.nix-config, potentially utilizing the nixos mcp tool if necessary, as part of this process.


**Analyzing Diagnostic Requirements**

I've shifted my focus to analyze the nature of this diagnostic, recognizing it's a blend of investigation and assessment. I'm carefully considering how to structure the investigation, given the existing tools and user instructions. I'm now exploring available NixOS MCP tools or command execution tools to align with the "when necessary" instruction. My next step will be to explore and evaluate the tools.
